title: Initial build-using-dockerfile implementation
body: Add a `build-using-dockerfile` command which uses `openshift/imagebuilder` to wrap parsing and handle most of the dispatching, and the logic behind the other subcommands to implement assorted instructions.

comments.body:
Updated:
* rebased
* golint clean
* tests no longer fail without #61 
* `Preserve()` is now implemented, so handling of volumes during bud should be more in line with expectations
* the bud command's `--arg` flag is now named `--build-arg`
* the bud command's `-t`, `-f`, and `-q` flags now also have long names `--tag`, `--file`, and `--quiet`
* Dockerfiles can be specified using http/https URLs
* context directories can be specified as "git://" URLs, "github.com/..." repositories, or as http/https URLs of archives
* handling of multiple Dockerfiles is more in line with how `openshift/imagebuildah` uses them (in order, only the first FROM: counts)
* renamed `getSystemContext()` to `makeSystemContext()`
* more tests

LGTM

Do we eventually want to turn ImageBuilder to use Buildah?  Might want to move this code out of ImageBuilder into Buildah at that point.
Moving the tell-Travis-to-stop-using-1.6 patch to #65 and rebasing before merging.

I think the imagebuilder CLI could be taught to toggle between its current dockerclient Executor and the one we implement here, as @smarterclayton suggested in https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/issues/33.  We don't yet support all of the options and hooks that the imagebuilder CLI tool wants to be able to specify, but that's fixable.

You should also be able to snip more of the dependency tree that we pull in - let me know if there are changes that need to be done to make the core imagebuilder code not depend on docker dependencies.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably e67d2e7) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Added a man page and updated the bash-completion script.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/d410ce9aeacb6fea9c993a5a632e361aa1ae3242.1492133151469983744/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing d410ce9aeacb6fea9c993a5a632e361aa1ae3242 to master...
